# solidfire_volume (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "solidfire_volume" "volume" {
  name       = "my-volume"
  account    = solidfire_account.k8s_account.id
  total_size = 1073742000
  enable512e = false
  min_iops   = 100
  max_iops   = 150
  burst_iops = 200
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enable512e` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `total_size` (Number)

### Optional

- `access` (String)
- `account` (String)
- `account_id` (Number)
- `attributes` (Map of String)
- `burst_iops` (Number)
- `max_iops` (Number)
- `min_iops` (Number)
- `qos_policy_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `iqn` (String)
